extortion.description: Sun Fiber LLC is a leading manufacturer and supplier of recycled polyester staple fiber (Re-PSF), catering primarily to the Home Textile and Furniture industries. The company is committed to providing customized filling solutions that meet a variety of customer needs with a focus on softness and comfort. Sun Fiber emphasizes a customer-centric approach, offering supply chain support, technical assistance, and personalized service. Established in 1999, Sun Fiber combines industry expertise with sustainable practices to ensure product quality and reliability.
